title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聰 STA. LUCIA ANNEX IN BARANGAY STA. LUCIA, CITY OF PAGADIAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR FROM THE ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS STA. LUCIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 3558; 106 OG No. 29, 4100 (July 19, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10106, May 14, 2010 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聰 STA. LUCIA ANNEX IN BARANGAY STA. LUCIA, CITY OF PAGADIAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR FROM THE ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS STA. LUCIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

芒聙聰 The Zamboanga del Sur National High School 芒聙聰 Sta. Lucia Annex in Barangay Sta. Lucia, City of Pagadian, Province of Zamboanga del Sur is hereby separated from the Zamboanga del Sur National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Sta. Lucia National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聰 All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Zamboanga del Sur National High School 芒聙聰 Sta. Lucia Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Sta. Lucia National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

芒聙聰 The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Sta. Lucia National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriations of the Zamboanga del Sur National High School 芒聙聰 Sta. Lucia Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

芒聙聰 The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

芒聙聰 This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 12, 2009 and February 2, 2010, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 14 2010

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
